summary: Live PR inventory shard classified without mutations. No shared canonical was selected. All listed PRs remain open: two require maintainer judgment, one Mattermost PR is related to its focused issue but blocked by author/review work, and two larger feature/follow-up PRs are not safe close candidates. Linked closed refs are treated as historical evidence only.
